text.title: trajectory-eval-otel Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for trajectory-eval-otel as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Add token, step, and latency axes to detect regressions in efficiency

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Stick to OTel GenAI conventions; map vendor specifics in attributes

failure-mode.description: Tracing the LLM call but not the tool result
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tool spans capture the half of the trajectory you actually need to debug

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hash long content; store full content in a side store referenced by hash

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each span should carry enough state to re-run the call

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Make eval a CI step; regress on cost just like on correctness
